change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Includes reports, meeting minutes, subject files and photographs pertaining to the Cornell ROTC program.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes reports, meeting minutes, subject files and photographs pertaining to the Cornell ROTC program and Cornellians who served in the military. Many materials relating to the service of Floyd R. Newman. Letters from soldiers home, many from World War I. Also a 1958 film from The Big Picture series showcasing Cornell.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University Military Science and ROTC records, #33-2-4134. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to individual transcripts in Box 9 restricted to the permission of the student and ROTC office during student's lifetime.

controlaccess.subject: World War, 1914-1918.
Aeronautics, Military -- New York (State) -- Ithaca
Military education.
controlaccess.corpname: United States. Army. Reserve Officers\' Training Corps
United States. Army. Army Specialized Training Program

did.unittitle: Series I. Administrative Documents and Miscellany
Change to General Military Science Curriculum
Change to General Military Science Curriculum
University Committees on Military Curricula and Requirements for Graduation
University Committees on Military Curricula and Requirements for Graduation
New York State Medical College - ROTC
Brigadier General R. Dean Tice Visit
Report of Presidential Commission on Military Training
Programs - Commissioning Ceremonies and Awards Ceremonies
WWI Appreciation Booklet from Simon Long's Sons, Wilkes Barre, Pennsylvania and Postcard to the "Heroes of Desert Storm"
Film from The Big Picture series showcasing Cornell

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Also a February 1958 article from the ALumni News about the filming.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Upper Alumni Field, featuring Field Artillery R.O.T.C, Polo Club, and Cayuga Valley Riding and Hunt Club.

did.unittitle: Eleventh Annual Cornell R.O.T.C. Horse Show and Gymkana
Cornell Veteran and Military Community alumni reunion weekend materials
Army Specialized Training Program - Academic Transcripts - (A-CON) - During student's lifetime individual transcripts restricted to permission of student and ROTC office.
Robert Stack certificate "Ordre National de la Legion D'honneur"
Part of a German military map
John J. Fulmer (1932-1937), Waldo Potter (1937-1940), G. S. Smith (1951-1954) - PMS
Arthur Conklin - Class of 1894, Howard Wortham - Class of 1914
Jess Creech - Class of 1920, John Donaldson - Class of 1921, George Pfann - Class of 1924
Bruce Clarke - Class of 1927, Derrill Daniel - Class of 1933, George Hologhwost - Class of 1937
F.R. Newman - Photos - Wortham Museum Barton Hall uniform exhibit dedication
"Events and Memorable Experiences by F.R. Newman
Certificates: "Rangers" certificate of appreciation 1984, Selden Allis, William Bradley
Letters from Lucius Hopwood to wife and daughter
Lucius Hopwood wallet and pocket dictionary
John W. Mack, College of Military Science certificate - rank of Captain in Corps of Cornell Cadets
Photo of Joseph Sydney Barr's War Alumnus proclamation
Materials relating to the Barton Hall World War Two Remembrance Garden Dedication

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes material on Cornellians Frederick Johnson, Matt Urban, Rodney Gould, and Raymond Thorpe.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Multiple wars, WW1, Newman material, canons, etc..

did.unittitle: Lehigh valley reserve officers, Military ball
Photograph of O.C.C. #17, Camp Hood, Texas
Group photograph of Cornell Military Department
Photograph of Cornell University annual inspection - Reserve Officers Training Corps
Photograph of 644 A, Fort Lewis Washington
Photograph of officers and cadets, with Capt. Pangborn Parsons and commanding officer
